indicators.name: dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is not suitable for computer work due to its height and lack of ergonomics for prolonged use.

indicators.name: yellow chairs
indicators.rationale: The yellow chairs are not designed for extended computer use and do not provide ergonomic support.

indicators.name: glass table surface
indicators.rationale: The glass table surface is slippery and not suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for extended computer use.

indicators.name: no dedicated workspace layout
indicators.rationale: The layout does not support a dedicated workspace for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The dining table and chairs are not suitable for extended use, and there is no flat surface or ergonomic seating available. The layout does not support a dedicated workspace for computer work.
